title: GUÍA PARA EXPLORADORES DE REDES TEMÁTICAS
subtitle: CÓMO DISEÑAR E IMPLEMENTAR REDES TEMÁTICAS PARA MAXIMIZAR EL COMPROMISO DEL USUARIO Y EL IMPACTO
description: A guide for coordinators and members of multi-actor thematic networks under EU Horizon 2020, providing best practices for designing, implementing, and sustaining networks to maximize user engagement and impact. It covers consortium formation, facilitation methods, knowledge generation, dissemination, and impact measurement across project phases.
